name: @orrgal1/forge
description: Self-contained forge chain for a PR — no dependency on other plugins. /forge-setup maps host-repo tooling (build/test/lint/typecheck/codegen/devenv/localenv) into a gitignored .forge/ directory; every other skill resolves repo commands through it, so forge adopts into any repo with zero coupling. /forge-goals captures the PR's intended end-state as a goal list. /forge-scenarios drafts when:/then: scenarios covering each goal (component-tier-observable behavior only). /forge-tests writes a test per scenario (or attaches an existing test), preferring the component tier. /forge-design maps every scenario to the design elements (components, symbols, data flow) that will satisfy it. /forge-audit aggregates the full attestation chain: PR has goals loyal to its source → each goal covered by ≥1 scenario → each scenario attached to a real component-tier test → each test body matches its scenario when/then + AAA → linked tests pass. Per-layer skills (/forge-verify-goals, /forge-verify-scenarios, /forge-verify-tests, /forge-verify-match, /forge-verify-runs) expose each layer for step-by-step attestation. /forge-impl-green drives linked tests to green. /forge-audit-green drives the audit to PASS via a fix-loop. /forge-ci-green drives PR CI to green. /forge-review-green drives the lens-designed review to 0 blockers + 0 majors. /forge-review (opt-in) is the single-pass forge-chain-aware lens-designed PR review, using a bundled lens pool + persona (extensible via .forge/lenses and .forge/personas). /forge-start opens the chain: resolves a source into a 1-3 sentence brief, lands a sentinel commit, pushes, opens a draft PR. /forge runs the whole arc end-to-end: start (draft PR + minimal brief) → goals (AWAIT_GOALS_REVIEW) → design (AWAIT_DESIGN_REVIEW) → scenarios → tests → impl → audit-green → ci-green → review-green → final ci → READY. Two modes: auto (pause only at goals + design), manual (pause after every phase). Operator resumes via /forge approve and /forge iterate "<feedback>". Artifacts live under .pr-artifacts/<branch-slug>/forge/.
